query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as totalCount,
  SUM(CAST(pr.cost AS DECIMAL(12,2))) as totalCost,
  SUM(CASE WHEN pr.paymentStatus = 'paid' THEN CAST(pr.cost AS DECIMAL(12,2)) ELSE 0 END) as paidCost,
  SUM(CASE WHEN pr.paymentStatus != 'paid' THEN CAST(pr.cost AS DECIMAL(12,2)) ELSE 0 END) as unpaidCost,
  c.name as channelName
FROM purchase_records pr
JOIN channels c ON pr.channelId = c.id
WHERE c.name LIKE '%идеальный%' AND pr.month = '2026-06'
GROUP BY c.name;
